name: ahp-conformance-mutation
description: AHP conformance mutation-testing harness. Runs StrykerJS over the canonical TypeScript reducers (clients/typescript/src/types/channels-*/reducer.ts + common/reducer-helpers.ts) and uses the in-process corpus replay (replay-corpus.mjs) as the kill-signal. DEV-ONLY: Stryker is isolated to THIS package and is NOT a dependency of the shipped @microsoft/agent-host-protocol client. Mutating the reducer and watching the conformance corpus fail proves the corpus has teeth; surviving mutants are the measured corpus gaps.
